name: phone
description: Phone number input block with country code selector.

props.name: value
props.description: Phone number digits only — no country code prefix.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with updated phone digit string whenever the input changes.

props.name: countries
props.description: Rich country list with dialCode and optional name. Preferred over countryCodes. Shows a picker when more than one entry is provided.

props.name: countryCodes
props.description: Simple list of dial code strings (e.g. ['+1', '+44']). Used when countries is not provided.

props.name: dialCode
props.description: Currently selected dial code (controlled). Defaults to the first entry in the country list.

props.name: onDialCodeChange
props.description: Called when the user selects a different dial code from the picker.

props.name: maxDigits
props.description: Maximum number of phone number digits the user can enter.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown inside the phone number field.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the field; also activates the error border colour.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the field when there is no error.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all interaction including the dial code picker and phone number field.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling input row minimum height and vertical padding.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the outer container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Stable test identifier passed to the underlying TextInput for automated testing.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Phone
  label="Mobile number"
  value={phone}
  onValueChange={setPhone}
  countries={[
    { dialCode: '+91', name: 'India' },
    { dialCode: '+1',  name: 'United States' },
    { dialCode: '+44', name: 'United Kingdom' },
  ]}
/>
